mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consignment_item_price ( id, item_code, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, customer_code, unit_price, currency, effective_from, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{itemCode}, #{company}, #{store}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{customerCode}, #{unitPrice}, #{currency}, #{effectiveFrom}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (item_code, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, customer_code, effective_from) DO UPDATE SET unit_price = EXCLUDED.unit_price, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, item_code, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, customer_code, unit_price, currency, effective_from, created_at, updated_at FROM consignment_item_price WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} AND effective_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (company = '' OR company = #{company}) AND (store = '' OR store = #{store}) AND (supplier_code = '' OR supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (supplier_contract = '' OR supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) AND (customer_code = '' OR customer_code = #{customerCode}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN company = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, CASE WHEN store = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, CASE WHEN supplier_code = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, CASE WHEN supplier_contract = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, CASE WHEN customer_code = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, effective_from DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
